actions.value:
It is possible to import a private key, for example, from a paper wallet.

Here the steps:

1) At the Main Wallet list screen, tap the + sign located next to the text "Wallets" or tap "Add Wallet" at the bottom of the wallets list. 

2) Select an EVM Wallet to create

3) Tap Import

4) Enter the text private key

5) You'll then be able to import that EVM wallet into Edge


Also please note that if you have any tokens you will have to re-enable them.  

​
